# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Full-object override ownership: copied from the pinned Spacefleet Tactica equivalence source.


SFTt_ENEMY_FAR_AWAY = {

    exists = solar_system
    exists = fleet

    fleet = {

		count_combatant_fleet = {

			count = 0

			limit = {

				any_owned_ship = {

					exists = solar_system

					OR = {

						SFTt_EXTREME_LONG_RANGE_SHIP = yes

						distance = {

							source = prevprevprev
							max_distance <= @SFTz_RANGE_0250
							same_solar_system = yes

						}

					}

				}

			}

		}

	}

}

SFTt_EXTREME_LONG_RANGE_SHIP = {

	OR = {
		is_ship_size = titan
		is_ship_size = ion_cannon
	}

}
